case_title: RINGGOLD COUNTY HOSPITAL vs. WESTFALL-WOLFE, PEGGY

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF RINGGOLD COUNTY HOSPITAL AS TO DEFENDANT WESTFALL-WOLFE, PEGGY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RINGGOLD COUNTY HOSPITAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTFALL-WOLFE, PEGGY $5,714.60 PRINCIPAL, $163.80 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,958.40 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
